title: astragalus stenophyllus var. residuus
intro: Astragalus stenophyllus var. residuus, also known as a type of milkvetch or astragalus, is a perennial herb that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Astragalus stenophyllus var. residuus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus stenophyllus var. residuus is typically prepared in herbal form, including dried roots, capsules, or extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
